ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly states 'Beerus'. Purple sphynx-cat deity with Egyptian collar in energy aura is Beerus's canonical visual signature. IP confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (BT1) was the inaugural main booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017, comprising 114 cards across 60 Commons, 30 Uncommons, 12 Rares, 8 Super Rares, and 4 Special Rares. [Trading Card Database: 2017 Dragon Ball Super Card Game BT1 Galactic Battle]

Beerus is the God of Destruction of Universe 7 and the twin brother of Champa, God of Destruction of Universe 6 — the fraternal-twin destroyer-god structure is foundational to DBS multiverse cosmology. Beerus's design was partially inspired by a Cornish Rex cat that had lived with Akira Toriyama during development, with the naming convention derived from 'virus' (which Toriyama reportedly misread as 'beer,' seeding the alcohol-themed naming pun used for all subsequent GoDs and attendants). [Wikipedia: Beerus]

BT1-042 is a Blue Battle card with 20,000 power and an energy cost of 4. It carries Double Strike (inflicts 2 damage instead of 1) and an Auto skill: if you have 5 or more energy when this card is played, KO up to 1 opponent Battle Card. The energy-threshold KO effect mirrors Beerus's in-universe role as a god whose destructive power activates at full power. [Big Orbit Cards / Games Haven TCG: BT1-042 card listing]

Beerus and Champa are twin siblings — each presides over one of a paired universe (U7 and U6 respectively). They are among the twelve Gods of Destruction in DBS cosmology, each paired with an angel attendant from the family of the Grand Minister. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Champa, via WebSearch snippet]
